abstract: Provides a certificate by its identifier.

declaration.code: func certificate(withIdentifier identifier: String) async throws(ManagedAppError) -> SecCertificate

overview:
## Return Value

The requested certificate

## Discussion

The MDM server can update the certificate at any time. After that, [doc://com.apple.managedapp/documentation/ManagedApp/ManagedAppIdentitiesProvider/identifiers] yields a new array of identifiers. Call this method again to obtain the updated certificate.

The MDM server can change the available certificates at any time. When that happens, the list of valid identifiers updates accordingly. For example, the list of valid identifiers might change between the time that the app accesses [doc://com.apple.managedapp/documentation/ManagedApp/ManagedAppIdentitiesProvider/identifiers] and then calls this method passing in one of its elements. So, the app needs to handle the case that this method throws [doc://com.apple.managedapp/documentation/ManagedApp/ManagedAppError/invalidIdentifier].

# certificate(withIdentifier:)

**Instance Method**

Provides a certificate by its identifier.

## Declaration

```swift
func certificate(withIdentifier identifier: String) async throws(ManagedAppError) -> SecCertificate
```

## Parameters

- **identifier**: The identifier of the requested certficate. This function throws [doc://com.apple.managedapp/documentation/ManagedApp/ManagedAppError/invalidIdentifier] if the value you supply isn’t currently in [doc://com.apple.managedapp/documentation/ManagedApp/ManagedAppIdentitiesProvider/identifiers].

## Return Value

The requested certificate

## Discussion

The MDM server can update the certificate at any time. After that, [doc://com.apple.managedapp/documentation/ManagedApp/ManagedAppIdentitiesProvider/identifiers] yields a new array of identifiers. Call this method again to obtain the updated certificate.

The MDM server can change the available certificates at any time. When that happens, the list of valid identifiers updates accordingly. For example, the list of valid identifiers might change between the time that the app accesses [doc://com.apple.managedapp/documentation/ManagedApp/ManagedAppIdentitiesProvider/identifiers] and then calls this method passing in one of its elements. So, the app needs to handle the case that this method throws [doc://com.apple.managedapp/documentation/ManagedApp/ManagedAppError/invalidIdentifier].
